allow: Bash(mv index-modern.html signup.html css js img package.json _legacy/)

Bash(mkdir -p src/features src/shared/components/ui src/shared/components/layout src/shared/hooks src/shared/lib src/shared/server src/shared/types src/shared/utils src/shared/constants src/shared/styles src/routes/api)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/signup -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"fullname":"ทดสอบ ระบบ","email":"test@mmd.co.th","phone":"081-234-5678","education":"senior","password":"secret123"}' -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/signup -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"fullname":"คนอื่น","email":"test@mmd.co.th","phone":"081-111-2222","education":"senior","password":"another1"}' -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port = $_.LocalPort; State = $_.State; PID = $_.OwningProcess; ProcessName = $proc.ProcessName; StartTime = $proc.StartTime } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001,3002,3003,3004,3005,3006,3007,3008 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port = $_.LocalPort; PID = $_.OwningProcess; ProcessName = $proc.ProcessName } } | Sort-Object Port | Format-Table -AutoSize)
